---
name: Feature request / 功能建议
about: Suggest an improvement for FxxkJson / 提出 FxxkJson 改进建议
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## 使用场景 / Use case

你想解决什么问题？  
What problem are you trying to solve?

## 建议方案 / Proposed solution

你希望 FxxkJson 怎么支持这个场景？  
How would you like FxxkJson to support this workflow?

## 替代方案 / Alternatives considered

现在有没有临时绕过方式？  
Do you have a current workaround?

## 额外信息 / Extra context

如果和大 JSON、搜索、对比、节点编辑、导入导出有关，请尽量说明文件大小和操作步骤。  
If this relates to large JSON, search, compare, node editing, import, or export, please include file size and workflow details when possible.
